programme.title: PL STORIES EP47: (Subbed) MO SALAH
programme.sub-title: We look back on the extraordinary career of Mohamed Salah, tracing his rise from a small village in Egypt to global football stardom. programme.title: PL STORIES EP07: (Subbed) BRUNO GUIMARÃES
programme.sub-title: We sit down with Bruno Guimarães to trace his remarkable journey from the streets of Brazil to Premier League stardom with Newcastle United. Bruno opens up about the sacrifices, setbacks, and defining moments that fuelled his rise, offering a heartfelt look at the person behind the player.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP16: (Subbed) KAORU MITOMA
programme.sub-title: Kaoru Mitoma's football talent was evident from a young age in Japan, but when a professional opportunity came, he made the unexpected choice that left many surprised. This episode unravels the unique path that took Mitoma from university to the Premier League, where he's now making his mark on the world’s toughest football stage.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP03: (Subbed) PL GOALSCORERS
programme.sub-title: We celebrate the greatest goalscorers in Premier League history; the icons whose instinct, power, and flair have lit up stadiums and etched their names into footballing folklore. From Alan Shearer’s relentless consistency to Thierry Henry’s elegance, Sergio Agüero’s killer instinct to Harry Kane’s rise, we relive the moments that defined an era.
programme.desc: We celebrate the greatest goalscorers in Premier League history; the icons whose instinct, power, and flair have lit up stadiums and etched their names into footballing folklore. From Alan Shearer’s relentless consistency to Thierry Henry’s elegance, Sergio Agüero’s killer instinct to Harry Kane’s rise, we relive the moments that defined an era.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: (Subbed) CLAUDE MAKÉLÉLÉ
programme.sub-title: We sit down with Claude Makélélé to reflect on the career of a true midfield master. Celebrated for redefining the defensive midfield role, Makélélé shares his memories of life in the Premier League, from joining Chelsea during a transformative era to becoming the heartbeat of a title-winning side. With insight from teammates, coaches, and opponents, we explore the intelligence, discipline, and influence that made his name synonymous with the position he perfected.
programme.desc: We sit down with Claude Makélélé to reflect on the career of a true midfield master. With insight from teammates, coaches, and opponents, we explore the intelligence, discipline, and influence that made his name synonymous with the position he perfected.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP12: (Subbed) LOUIS SAHA
programme.sub-title: ‘Petit Louis’, raised in the northern suburbs of Paris, grew to be one of the greatest strikers of his generation, before a succession of injuries ground his career to a halt. ‘King Louis’ himself tells us the story of what made him rise to the top, with insight from the coaches and teammates that helped guide him along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP50: CHRIS WOOD
programme.sub-title: We follow New Zealand striker Chris Wood during a crucial World Cup Qualifier on home soil, at the peak of one of the most impressive seasons of his career. Back in his hometown, we meet the family, coaches and friends who helped shape the player and the person he’s become. From humble beginnings to Premier League mainstay, Wood reflects on the pressures he's faced, the pride of leading his country, and the mindset that's driven him every step of the way.

programme.title: UNDER THE SKIN NOTTINGHAM FOREST
programme.sub-title: This documentary celebrates the incredible, rollercoaster ride of Nottingham Forest Showcasing the club’s fans, culture and traditions, we see how Forest’s return to European football was achieved by reconnecting with the legacy of Brian Clough.
programme.desc: This documentary celebrates the incredible, rollercoaster ride of Nottingham Forest Showcasing the club’s fans, culture and traditions, we see how Forest’s return to European football was achieved by reconnecting with the legacy of Brian Clough.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP06: RODRI & LAMPARD
programme.sub-title: Arguably the best player in his position in world football right now, Rodri has honed his talents on the pitch to help Manchester City achieve a record 4 Premier League titles in a row. In this week’s Big Interview, former Chelsea and City playmaker, Frank Lampard talks to Rodri about the intricacies of his game. From positioning, breaking up play to how he’s developed his role, this midfield masterclass will reveal all about his game.
programme.desc: Arguably the best player in his position in world football right now, Rodri has honed his talents on the pitch to help Manchester City achieve a record 4 Premier League titles in a row. In this week’s Big Interview, former Chelsea and City playmaker, Frank Lampard talks to Rodri about the intricacies of his game. From positioning, breaking up play to how he’s developed his role, this midfield masterclass will reveal all about his game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP35: ROBERT PIRES
programme.sub-title: This week on The Big Interview, two-time Premier League champion, Robert Pires sits down to talk through his career and all things Arsenal. Having joined the club during Arsene Wenger’s reign, Pires played in one of the greatest sides in the clubs’ history - as well as helping them achieve invincible status in 2003/04. The French winger recalls almost quitting football at a young age and how his mother persuaded him to change his mind, winning the World Cup with France, the difficulties he faced when he first joined the Gunners and what this current Arsenal side need to do to win the Premier League title once again.
programme.desc: This week on The Big Interview, two-time Premier League champion, Robert Pires sits down to talk through his career and all things Arsenal. Having joined the club during Arsene Wenger’s reign, Pires played in one of the greatest sides in the clubs’ history - as well as helping them achieve invincible status in 2003/04. The French winger recalls almost quitting football at a young age and how his mother persuaded him to change his mind, winning the World Cup with France, the difficulties he faced when he first joined the Gunners and what this current Arsenal side need to do to win the Premier League title once again.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP52: CHAMPIONS STORY
programme.sub-title: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football—Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United’s record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides—Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League. From legendary goals to seismic title races, this is the story of two giants locked in a battle for supremacy. Woven through it all is the significance of Liverpool’s record-equalling achievement—a milestone that adds a powerful new chapter to football’s greatest rivalry.
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football—Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United’s record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides—Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League. From legendary goals to seismic title races, this is the story of two giants locked in a battle for supremacy. Woven through it all is the significance of Liverpool’s record-equalling achievement—a milestone that adds a powerful new chapter to football’s greatest rivalry.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP15: STEVE MCMANAMAN
programme.sub-title: Steve McManaman revisits ten standout moments from his Premier League career, from his breakthrough at Anfield to unforgettable solo goals and Merseyside derby magic. With flair, humour and personal insight, PL Moments takes you inside the story of one of the Premier League’s most creative and entertaining players.
programme.desc: Steve McManaman revisits ten standout moments from his Premier League career, from his breakthrough at Anfield to unforgettable solo goals and Merseyside derby magic. With flair, humour and personal insight, PL Moments takes you inside the story of one of the Premier League’s most creative and entertaining players.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP10: MICHAEL OWEN: MY BREAKTHROUGH YEARS
programme.sub-title: Michael Owen burst onto the scene for Liverpool at just seventeen years of age, and in two consecutive seasons the teenage sensation won the Premier League Golden Boot. Owen recalls those campaigns for the Reds, reliving the key moments that helped him develop into one of the greatest players of his generation.
programme.desc: Michael Owen burst onto the scene for Liverpool at just seventeen years of age, and in two consecutive seasons the teenage sensation won the Premier League Golden Boot. Owen recalls those campaigns for the Reds, reliving the key moments that helped him develop into one of the greatest players of his generation.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP06: TIM SHERWOOD: MY GREATEST SEASON
programme.sub-title: Blackburn Rovers' Premier League title win in 1994/95 was a historic achievement. Under the guidance of Kenny Dalglish, and fuelled by the prolific partnership of Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton, the small-town club dethroned Manchester United and reached the pinnacle of English football. Captain Tim Sherwood recalls the key moments.
programme.desc: Blackburn Rovers' Premier League title win in 1994/95 was a historic achievement. Under the guidance of Kenny Dalglish, and fuelled by the prolific partnership of Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton, the small-town club dethroned Manchester United and reached the pinnacle of English football. Captain Tim Sherwood recalls the key moments.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP20: COLE PALMER
programme.sub-title: This week’s Big Interview sees two of Chelsea’s biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game. From free kicks to finishing, the pair watch and talk through clips of their play and then recreate those moments on the pitch. This one is not to be missed.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP06: RODRI & LAMPARD
programme.sub-title: Arguably the best player in his position in world football right now, Rodri has honed his talents on the pitch to help Manchester City achieve a record 4 Premier League titles in a row. In this week’s Big Interview, former Chelsea and City playmaker, Frank Lampard talks to Rodri about the intricacies of his game. From positioning, breaking up play to how he’s developed his role, this midfield masterclass will reveal all about his game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP20: COLE PALMER
programme.sub-title: This week’s Big Interview sees two of Chelsea’s biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game. From free kicks to finishing, the pair watch and talk through clips of their play and then recreate those moments on the pitch. This one is not to be missed.

programme.title: THE ART OF... EP04: CENTRAL DEFENSIVE MIDFIELDER
programme.sub-title: Owen Hargreaves unpacks The Art of.. The Central Defensive Midfielder, drawing on his time with England and Manchester United. programme.title: PL STORIES EP34: (Subbed) CESC FABREGAS
programme.sub-title: A product of Barcelona’s famed La Masia youth academy, Cesc Fabregas is rightly remembered as one of the greatest midfield players of his generation. After making his Arsenal debut at just 16 years of age the diminutive Spaniard would go on to win titles in both England and Spain as well as becoming a World Cup winner in 2010. Now taking his first steps into coaching with Como 1907, Fabregas reflects on his footballing education as well as his hopes for the future in management.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP42: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL WITH CURTIS JONES
programme.sub-title: With the remnants of the celebratory confetti barely gone from the Anfield pitch, Curtis Jones joins the Big Interview to reflect on an historic title-winning season. Having signed for his beloved team at just 9 years of age, the Liverpool born and bred midfielder explains just how much the title triumph means to him and sheds light on the impact of Arne Slot and the differences in approach of his new manager compared to Jurgen Klopp. In a year where Jones also enjoyed a goal-scoring senior debut for England and became a father for the first time, there's been plenty for him to celebrate.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.sub-title: Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. There were also tactical transformations, shifts in narrative trends, and a more open field than ever before. Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: UNDER THE SKIN NOTTINGHAM FOREST

programme.title: PL STORIES EP29: ANDY ROBERTSON
programme.sub-title: From his humble beginnings at Queen’s Park in Scotland to becoming a key player for Liverpool, Andy Robertson’s rise is a tale of resilience, hard work, and determination. We delve in to his early struggles, his breakthrough at Hull City, and his crucial role in Liverpool's historic Premier League and Champions League triumphs. Featuring exclusive interviews with teammates, coaches, and Robertson himself, this episode celebrates his leadership, passion, and relentless spirit on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: KEEP IT IN THE FAMILY
programme.sub-title: We celebrate the unique legacy of footballing dynasties in the Premier League; where talent, passion, and pride are passed from one generation to the next. From the iconic saves of Peter Schmeichel to the rise of his son Kasper, the goal-scoring legacy of Ian Wright carried on by son’s Shaun and Bradley, and the Lampards' deep-rooted Chelsea connection, this episode explores the bonds that tie football families together. Through exclusive interviews and emotional reflections, we uncover how the Premier League has become a stage not just for individual greatness, but for generational stories written in the beautiful game.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP20: MCI v QPR 11/12
programme.sub-title: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: GOODBYE GOODISON
programme.sub-title: As the curtain comes down on Everton’s time at Goodison Park, PL Stories takes a poignant look back at one of English football’s most iconic grounds. For over 130 years, Goodison has been more than just a stadium; it’s been a home, a fortress, and the stage for countless moments of triumph, heartbreak, and unforgettable drama. Through the voices of players, fans, and historians, we relive the stories etched into the blue brick walls; from title-winning glory to relegation battles, Merseyside derbies to European nights. This is a tribute to the legacy of Goodison Park, and the soul of a club that has lived and breathed within its stands.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP32: (Subbed) MANCHESTER CITY - THE SEASON THAT STARTED IT ALL
programme.sub-title: In a nail-biting climax to the 2011-2012 Premier League season, Manchester City clinched the title with unparalleled drama. Facing Queens Park Rangers on the final matchday, City secured a 3-2 victory with Sergio Agüero's iconic last-minute goal, securing their first league title in 44 years and etching that game into footballing folklore. They have since become the dominant power in English football and we look at how it all began.
programme.desc: In a nail-biting climax to the 2011-2012 Premier League season, Manchester City clinched the title with unparalleled drama. Facing Queens Park Rangers on the final matchday, City secured a 3-2 victory with Sergio Agüero's iconic last-minute goal, securing their first league title in 44 years and etching that game into footballing folklore. They have since become the dominant power in English football and we look at how it all began.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP52: CHAMPIONS STORY
programme.sub-title: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football—Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United’s record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides—Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League. From legendary goals to seismic title races, this is the story of two giants locked in a battle for supremacy. Woven through it all is the significance of Liverpool’s record-equalling achievement—a milestone that adds a powerful new chapter to football’s greatest rivalry.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP07: BRAD FRIEDEL
programme.sub-title: Arguably the greatest American goalkeeper of all time, Brad Friedel made an incredible 450 appearances in the Premier League playing for Tottenham, Aston Villa, Blackburn and Liverpool. We sit down with the 52-year-old to recount his incredible journey to the top of English football.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP49: BILL FOLEY
programme.sub-title: Upon creating an American Ice Hockey team, owner Bill Foley outlandlishly claimed his team would lift the Stanley Cup in six years. His dream came true. Now, owner of AFC Bournemouth and flying in the Premier League, he’s already making bold claims for the Cherries’ future.
programme.desc: Upon creating an American Ice Hockey team, owner Bill Foley outlandlishly claimed his team would lift the Stanley Cup in six years. His dream came true. Now, owner of AFC Bournemouth and flying in the Premier League, he’s already making bold claims for the Cherries’ future.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: GOODBYE GOODISON
programme.sub-title: As the curtain comes down on Everton’s time at Goodison Park, PL Stories takes a poignant look back at one of English football’s most iconic grounds. For over 130 years, Goodison has been more than just a stadium; it’s been a home, a fortress, and the stage for countless moments of triumph, heartbreak, and unforgettable drama. Through the voices of players, fans, and historians, we relive the stories etched into the blue brick walls; from title-winning glory to relegation battles, Merseyside derbies to European nights. This is a tribute to the legacy of Goodison Park, and the soul of a club that has lived and breathed within its stands.
